title: Carney称美国对Anthropic禁令凸显依赖少数大型AI模型的风险
full_text:
Technology
AI
Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney during a visit to Aughagower, in Co Mayo, as part of his trip to Ireland, on June 14.
Photographer: Andrew Downes/PA Images/Getty Images
Gift this article
Contact us: Provide news feedback or report an error
Confidential tip? Send a tip to our reporters
Site feedback: Take our Survey
By Brian Platt and Thomas Seal
June 14, 2026 at 5:02 PM UTC
Save
Prime Minister Mark Carney said the US export ban blocking all foreign access to Anthropic PBC ’s latest artificial intelligence models underscores the risk of depending on just a handful of powerful AI tools.
“The situation we’re in collectively right now with Mythos and Fable is something that can happen with over-reliance on certain models,” Carney told reporters Sunday during a visit to Ireland, referring to the AI models’ names.

discovery_record.discovery_title: Carney称美国对Anthropic禁令凸显依赖少数大型AI模型的风险
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 加拿大总理Mark Carney表示，美国出口禁令封锁了外国对Anthropic最新AI模型的所有访问，这凸显了只依赖少数几款强大AI工具所蕴含的风险。Anthropic的模型被限制后，海外用户无法获取其最新版本，Carney以此警告各国不应过度集中于少数头部模型供应商。

key_excerpts.text: 加拿大总理Mark Carney表示，美国出口禁令封锁了外国对Anthropic最新AI模型的所有访问，这凸显了只依赖少数几款强大AI工具所蕴含的风险。Anthropic的模型被限制后，海外用户无法获取其最新版本，Carney以此警告各国不应过度集中于少数头部模型供应商。
